articles.title: SEC Proposes Rescission of Climate-Related Disclosure Rules
articles.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed the rescission of overly burdensome and costly rules that require companies to provide certain climate-related information in

articles.title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing ‘final determination’ on deal
articles.summary: Trump's Truth Social statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.

articles.title: 执政一年后，默茨会将内阁中的社民党换成绿党吗？
articles.summary: 袁杰：人们对“黑红联盟”能否维持下去的疑虑正在加深，但从默茨、克林拜尔、索德尔等人的表态来看，联盟党和社民党的领导人仍愿维持联盟。

articles.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32% for its best day ever as AI server revenue soars
articles.summary: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

articles.title: 斯塔默还没下台，工党已开始准备下一位首相
articles.summary: 何越：工党内越来越多的人开始认真思考，如果未来真的进入“后斯塔默时代”，谁既能维持工党执政，又不会重新撕裂整个工党？

articles.title: 如何把人工智能关进“笼子”里
articles.summary: 科恩布勒：目前，人工智能在一个不被问责的地带中运行。人工智能的运行规则应该由民主选择来制定，而不是由行动最快的公司来决定。

articles.title: Only three-quarters of first class mail delivered on time
articles.summary: Royal Mail says its service is improving and that it is on track to hit the regulator Ofcom's reduced targets

articles.title: Universal rejects billionaire Bill Ackman's takeover bid
articles.summary: The music giant said Pershing Square's offer fundamentally undervalued the business.

articles.title: 为什么简单的预测方法往往有奇效？
articles.summary: 哈福德：即便是专家——不，应该说特别是专家——也会被高深的思想牵着鼻子走，从而忽略了简单、直接的方法。

articles.title: Top UK chefs call for cutting VAT for pubs and restaurants to 10%
articles.summary: Tom Kerridge, Yotam Ottolenghi, Ravneet Gill and Simon Rogan told BBC Newsnight VAT should be halved to ease mounting pressure on the hospitality industry.

claims.context: - 软件板块录得2001年以来最佳月度表现，ServiceNow月内涨超40%，AI对SaaS业务冲击的“SaaSpocalypse”担忧明显消退【新闻5033】【新闻5063】。

claims.context: - **科技与产业主题**: Dell财报显示AI服务器收入同比飙升757%，刺激股价创历史最大单日涨幅32%，并带动其他服务器制造商股价【新闻5030】【新闻5064】。但目前仅为个股级别的盈利驱动爆发，AI资本开支向全产业链的二次扩散路径和持续性仍需时间验证，暂列为观察，不升级为产业普涨结论。
